title: Casual Catch-Up
opening: Hey there! How was your weekend? Did you manage to get up to anything interesting?

t1.prompt: Hey there! How was your weekend? Did you manage to get up to anything interesting?
t1.promptTranslation: Hey there! How was your weekend? Did you manage to get up to anything interesting?

t2_good_weekend.prompt: Oh, that sounds promising! Do tell, what did you get up to? Spill the beans!
t2_good_weekend.promptTranslation: Oh, that sounds promising! Do tell, what did you get up to? Spill the beans!

t2_busy_weekend.prompt: Ah, the ever-elusive relaxing weekend! I know that feeling all too well. Was it more work-related, or just a whirlwind of personal errands?
t2_busy_weekend.promptTranslation: Ah, the ever-elusive relaxing weekend! I know that feeling all too well. Was it more work-related, or just a whirlwind of personal errands?

t2_quiet_weekend.prompt: Oh, a quiet one, then? Sometimes that's exactly what the doctor ordered, a chance to recharge. Did you make the most of the peace and quiet?
t2_quiet_weekend.promptTranslation: Oh, a quiet one, then? Sometimes that's exactly what the doctor ordered, a chance to recharge. Did you make the most of the peace and quiet?

t3_general_followup.prompt: That sounds like quite the weekend! It's always good to either get things done, dive into a hobby, or simply unwind. Anyway, I've really enjoyed our chat, but I'm afraid duty calls!
t3_general_followup.promptTranslation: That sounds like quite the weekend! It's always good to either get things done, dive into a hobby, or simply unwind. Anyway, I've really enjoyed our chat, but I'm afraid duty calls!

t-repeat.prompt: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you rephrase or tell me more simply? I'm all ears!
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you rephrase or tell me more simply? I'm all ears!

t-end.prompt: Well, it's been a genuine pleasure chatting with you. I'm afraid I've got to dash, but let's pick this
